The ones who never miss a Story. Who reply within minutes. Who DM you after a rough week. They're not just followers. They're your people. Creator Subscriptions gives them exclusive access. What going deeper looks like
A little more for your subscribers.
A lot more predictability for you.
📺
Appointment viewing
A subscriber-only Story series, same day every week. Subscribers know exactly when to show up. Canceling feels like breaking a ritual.
💬
The weekly snap
A mass snap sent directly into each subscriber's personal chat feed. Not a broadcast. A message that lands between texts from their closest friends.
🗳️
Subscriber-only polls
Let your community vote on what you make next using Snap's poll stickers. Costs you nothing. Makes them feel like insiders.

Creators keep 40% of subscription revenue, after Snapchat's 30% platform fee and Apple's 30% App Store fee. Typical free-to-paid conversion: 1–10%. We're modeling 2%, the conservative end.
